sum: Compatibility fix for Wheels of Prophecy. Install this after Wheels to resolve any scripting conflicts with other mods.
no: Compatibility fix for Wheels of Prophecy that resolves a variable bug preventing game completion. Required when running Wheels of Prophecy alongside Ascension.

co.n: Fix variable bug preventing the player from finishing the game
co.tp2n: Fix variable bug preventing the player from finishing the game
co.no: Fixes variable bug preventing game completion in Wheels of Prophecy.
